Master controller for climate simulation integration with Per Aspera Manages bidirectional synchronization between simulation and game state Provides the requested bidirectional control over atmospheric values.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Commands.ExecuteFromYaml(System.String)
member.summary: Parse and execute all actions defined in a YAML string. Supports any console debug command (~) as well as native SDK commands. The YAML root must be an "actions:" key.

example.code: int count = Commands.ExecuteFromYaml(@" actions: - command: FinishConstructions arguments: [] daysDelay: 0.0 showInFrontend: false - command: SetEngineTimescale arguments: ['2.0'] daysDelay: 0.0 showInFrontend: false ");

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Commands.ExecuteFromYamlFile(System.String)
member.summary: Parse and execute all actions from a YAML file on disk. Supports both "actions:" wrapped format and raw YAML list format. Works for any console debug command (~) and all native SDK commands.
member.param: Absolute path to the YAML actions file
member.returns: Number of actions executed successfully, -1 if file not found or parse failed

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.CustomModifierRegistry
member.summary:
Registry for custom YAML enhancement modifier handlers registered by mods. Checked by after native Enable() runs.
Usage mirrors : 1. Register a handler in your plugin Load(). 2. Declare the modifier key in your enhancements.yaml. 3. The handler is called each time an enhancement with that key is enabled.

member.param: Modifier key as it appears in YAML (case-insensitive, e.g. "drone_hop_capacity")
Handler called each time an enhancement with this key is enabled

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.AddResearchPointsAction
member.summary:
Adds research points directly to the player faction (not tied to current technology).
launchActions: - command: AddResearchPoints arguments: ["500"]

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.BlackboardExpressionEvaluator
member.summary:
Evaluates a math expression string, resolving variable names via a lookup delegate.
Supports: operators : + - * / (with standard precedence and unary -) grouping : ( expr ) literals : integer and decimal numbers (InvariantCulture) variables : any [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]* identifier → resolved by the lookup delegate functions : min(a,b) max(a,b) abs(x) floor(x) ceil(x) round(x) sqrt(x) clamp(x, lo, hi)
Thread-safety: create a new per call, or use the static helper which does so internally.
YAML example:
- command: SetBlackboardMath arguments: - "ami_score" - "clamp(ami_base * difficulty_mult + ami_bonus, 0, 100)"

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.BlackboardExpressionEvaluator.Evaluate(System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.Single},PerAspera.Core.LogAspera)
member.summary: Evaluate and return the numeric result. Unknown variables resolve to 0 (logged as warnings). Returns (result=0, ok=false) on parse errors.

member.returns: True on success, false if arguments are invalid or faction unavailable

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.ImportResourceAction
member.summary:
Built-in SDK action: imports any resource into the player faction's storage. Registered automatically by Commands.Initialize().
This replaces the native ImportResource console command which only supports a limited set of gases and uses a different argument order.
YAML usage:
launchActions: - command: ImportResource arguments: - "WATER" # resource key (required) - "1000" # amount (required, must be positive) daysDelay: 0.0
Arguments: [0] resourceKey — the resource type key as defined in resource.yaml (e.g. WATER, ICE, CHG, NITROGEN, OXYGEN, IRON, SILICON…) [1] amount — quantity to add (float, required, must be positive)
Returns false (with a warning) if: - resourceKey argument is missing or empty - amount argument is missing, not a valid number, or not positive - player faction is not available in context - the game console is not accessible (game not ready)

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.ImportResourceAction.CommandName
member.summary: The name used in YAML under "command:". Case-insensitive at runtime.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.ImportResourceAction.Execute(System.String[],PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.SDK.GameCommandsReadyEvent)
member.summary: Executes the action: imports the specified resource into the player faction's storage.
member.param: Game context — provides faction name for the console command
member.returns: true on success, false on any validation or execution failure

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.SetBlackboardMathAction
member.summary:
Evaluates a math expression and writes the result into a universe blackboard variable. Variable names in the expression are resolved from the same blackboard at evaluation time.
Supported operators : + - * / (standard precedence, unary -) Grouping : ( expr ) Literals : 42 3.14 1e3 Variables : any blackboard key — resolved to 0 if absent (with log warning) Functions : min(a,b) max(a,b) abs(x) floor(x) ceil(x) round(x) sqrt(x) clamp(x, lo, hi)
YAML usage:
# Simple increment (replaces AddBlackboardNumber) - command: SetBlackboardMath arguments: ["ami_affinity", "ami_affinity + 10"]
# Scale from another variable - command: SetBlackboardMath arguments: ["ami_score", "ami_base * difficulty_mult + ami_bonus"]
# Clamp result to a range - command: SetBlackboardMath arguments: ["ami_affinity", "clamp(ami_affinity + reward, 0, 100)"]
# Combine multiple variables - command: SetBlackboardMath arguments: ["total_resources", "iron + aluminum * 2 + steel * 3"]

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.ShowMessageAction
member.summary:
Built-in SDK action: logs a message to the BepInEx console. Registered automatically by Commands.Initialize().
YAML usage:
actions: - command: ShowMessage arguments: - "Hello from my mod!"
Arguments: [0] message — the text to display (required) [1] level — optional: Info (default), Warning, Error

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.ShowMessageAction.CommandName
member.summary: Gets the YAML command name for this action.

member.summary: Logs the message at the requested level via BepInEx.
member.param: Game context (not required for this action)
member.returns: True if a message was provided, false otherwise

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.BuiltinActions.ShowSpaceportResourcesAction
member.summary:
Debug command: logs all spaceport resource states to BepInEx log. Shows developmentResources (gathered so far) and resourcesMet flag for each active spaceport.
YAML usage:
- command: ShowSpaceportResources arguments: []
MIGRATION 2026-06-10 — réécrit en accès typé via PortProjectWrapper. Élimine ~48 RS0030 (GetProperty/GetValue sur Faction/SpacePortComponent/PortProject/ResourceType/CargoQuantity). Source de vérité : Tools\InteropDump\ScriptsAssembly\Faction.cs (spacePorts), SpacePortComponent.cs (portProject), PortProject.cs (stage/done/developmentResources).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.IModTextAction
member.summary:
Interface for custom mod-defined TextActions executable from YAML. Implement this interface to create your own game commands that can be triggered from YAML action files, just like native Per Aspera commands.
Register your action with before the game starts, typically in your plugin's Load() method.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.IModTextAction.CommandName
member.summary: The command name as it appears in YAML (case-insensitive). Must be unique across all registered actions.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.IModTextAction.Execute(System.String[],PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.SDK.GameCommandsReadyEvent)
member.summary: Execute the action.
member.param: Arguments from the YAML definition (may be empty)
Game context — provides access to Universe, Planet, Faction, etc. Will be null if Initialize() was not called before execution.
member.returns: True if the action succeeded, false if it failed

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.ModActions.ModTextActionRegistry
member.summary:
Registry for mod-defined implementations. Actions registered here are automatically bridged into the and become executable from YAML action files.
The game context () is injected at dispatch time so actions always receive fresh Universe/Planet/Faction references.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Native.IL2CPPInterop.CommandBaseWrapper
member.summary:
Wrapper over native CommandBase instances. All property/method access delegates to IL2CppExtensions (RS0030-exempt in Core), eliminating direct reflection (GetProperty/GetMethod/Invoke) from GameAPI layer.
MIGRATION 2026-06-10 - rewrite en delegues IL2CppExtensions. Elimine ~30 RS0030 (GetMethod/GetProperty/Invoke en GameAPI). Source de verite : Tools/InteropDump/ScriptsAssembly/PerAspera.Commands/CommandBase.cs - faction : virtual Faction - senderFaction: Faction field (writable) - isValid() : virtual bool - ToTabbedString(): virtual string

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.NativeDispatchInterceptPatch
member.summary:
Harmony prefix on InteractionManager.DispatchAction that intercepts any TextAction whose command name is registered in .
This means custom SDK actions (e.g. ShowMessage) registered via Commands.RegisterAction<T>() or Commands.RegisterHandler() can be used directly in ANY native YAML context: - SpecialProjectType.launchActions / completeActions - rule-patch.yaml actions - technology unlockActions - anywhere the game calls InteractionManager.DispatchAction

example.code: # project.yaml — works after Commands.RegisterAction<ShowMessageAction>() launchActions: - command: ShowMessage arguments: ['coucou'] daysDelay: 0.0

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.NativeDispatchInterceptPatch.CurrentSender
member.summary: The IHandleable sender of the current dispatch call. Set for the duration of handler execution so actions can access the live sender. Typically the Faction for SpecialProject launch actions.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.NativeDispatchInterceptPatch.Prefix(IHandleable,GameEventBus,TextAction,System.String)
member.summary: Prefix: if the command matches a registered custom handler, execute it and return false (skip native dispatch). Otherwise return true (let native run).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.ValidateConstraintsPatch
member.summary:
Harmony prefix on SpecialProjectType.ValidateConstraints() that validates custom SDK actions registered in .
Without this patch, any launchAction or completeAction that uses a registered custom command is rejected at YAML load time with "Invalid action command X", because the native ValidateConstraints uses an AOT-inlined validation path that bypasses InteractionParser.VerifyAction.
This patch intercepts ONLY when the project contains custom SDK commands. When custom commands are present it validates ALL actions itself:
Custom commands (in ) are always valid.
Native commands are validated via .
When no custom commands are present the native method runs unchanged.

example.code: # project.yaml — passes validation at load time with this patch launchActions: - command: GiveSciencePoints arguments: ['2000'] daysDelay: 0.0

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.ValidateConstraintsPatch.Prefix(SpecialProjectType,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Prefix: when the project has at least one custom SDK action, validate all actions ourselves and skip the native method (which would reject custom commands).
member.returns: false (skip native) when custom commands are present; true (run native) otherwise.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.ValidateConstraintsPatch.CollectActions(SpecialProjectType)
member.summary: Collects all entries from launchActions and completeActions on the given instance.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.VerifyActionPatch
member.summary:
Harmony prefix on InteractionParser.VerifyAction that bypasses the native validation for any whose command is registered in .
Without this patch the game rejects custom commands at YAML load time (SpecialProjectType.ValidateConstraints → VerifyAction → "Invalid action command") even though the runtime dispatch would work correctly via .
With this patch, load-time validation passes for all registered custom commands, allowing them to be used in launchActions, completeActions, unlockActions, etc.

example.code: # project.yaml — now valid at load time AND dispatched at runtime launchActions: - command: ShowMessage arguments: ['coucou'] daysDelay: 0.0

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Patches.VerifyActionPatch.Prefix(TextAction,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Prefix: if the TextAction's command is a registered custom handler, set result to true and skip the native method (which would return false).
member.returns: false = skip native (our result is used); true = let native run.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition
member.summary: Represents a single action entry in a YAML actions block. Matches the native TextAction format used by technology.yaml and rule.yaml.

example.code: # In technology.yaml or a custom actions.yaml: actions: - command: UnlockBuilding arguments: - PlayerFaction - building_water_mine daysDelay: 0.0 showInFrontend: false - command: FinishConstructions arguments: [] daysDelay: 0.0 showInFrontend: false

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition.Command
member.summary: Console command name (e.g. "UnlockBuilding", "FinishConstructions", "SetEngineTimescale"). Case-insensitive match with native game console commands.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition.Arguments
member.summary: Ordered list of arguments passed to the command. Matches the native TextAction.arguments field.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition.DaysDelay
member.summary: Delay in in-game days before this action executes. 0.0 means execute immediately.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition.ShowInFrontend
member.summary: Whether this action should be visible in the game frontend UI.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition.Label
member.summary: Optional human-readable label for debugging and logging. Not used by the game engine.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition.ToString
member.summary: Returns a short string representation for logging purposes.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionsFile
member.summary: Represents a standalone YAML file containing a list of actions to execute. Use when you want to define actions in a dedicated file (e.g. startup-actions.yaml).

example.code: # startup-actions.yaml actions: - command: FinishConstructions arguments: [] daysDelay: 0.0 showInFrontend: false - command: ImportResource arguments: - PlayerFaction - Water - "1000" daysDelay: 0.0 showInFrontend: false

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionsFile.Actions
member.summary: List of actions to execute.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor
member.summary:
Executes YAML-defined actions using a hybrid strategy: 1. If the command is a known native SDK command → dispatches via InteractionManager (TextAction) 2. Otherwise → falls back to ConsoleWrapper.ExecuteCommandString (all console commands)
This allows every debug console command (~) to be driven from YAML.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor.Initialize(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.SDK.GameCommandsReadyEvent)
member.summary: Initializes the native game context from a GameCommandsReadyEvent. Must be called before native command dispatch (UnlockKnowledge, UnlockBuilding, etc.).

example.code: YamlCommandsExecutor.Initialize(evt);

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor.ExecuteAction(PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition)
member.summary: Execute a single YAML action definition. Uses native TextAction dispatch for known SDK commands, console fallback for all others.
member.returns: True if the action was dispatched without error

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor.ExecuteActions(System.Collections.Generic.List{PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition})
member.summary: Execute all actions in the list, in order.
member.returns: Number of actions that executed without error

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor.ExecuteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Parse and execute all actions from a YAML file.
member.param: Absolute path to the YAML file
member.returns: Number of actions that executed without error, -1 if parse failed

member.summary: Dispatch via native TextAction through InteractionManager using pure reflection. This is the same path the game uses for technology.yaml actions.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor.BuildConsoleCommandString(PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlActionDefinition)
member.summary: Build "CommandName arg1 arg2 ..." string for console execution. Arguments are space-separated; arguments containing spaces are quoted.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsExecutor.DispatchNativeTextAction(TextAction)
member.summary: Dispatch a native TextAction through the game's static InteractionManager.DispatchAction. Uses stored player faction + gameEventBus — set via Initialize(). Selects the 4-param static overload to avoid AmbiguousMatchException.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsParser
member.summary: Parses YAML action definitions from strings or files. Supports two formats: - Inline list: a YAML string/file whose root is a list of action objects - Wrapped file: a YAML file with a root "actions:" key (YamlActionsFile format)

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsParser.ParseString(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a YAML string containing an "actions:" block (YamlActionsFile format). The root key must be "actions:".
member.returns: List of action definitions, or empty list on failure

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsParser.ParseList(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a raw YAML list of actions (no root key wrapper). The YAML root is directly a sequence of action objects.
member.param: YAML string where root is a list
member.returns: List of action definitions, or empty list on failure

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Commands.Yaml.YamlCommandsParser.ParseFile(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a YAML file containing an "actions:" block. Automatically tries YamlActionsFile format first, then raw list as fallback.
member.param: Absolute path to the YAML file
member.returns: List of action definitions, or empty list if file not found or parse fails

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.DiplomacyService.MirrorToBlackboard(System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Active le miroir de réputation d'une entité dans le blackboard principal du jeu. La variable main.{blackboardKeyPrefix}{entityId} = valeur float ±100 est mise à jour à chaque changement de réputation.
Cela permet aux Criterion YAML natifs de déclencher des quêtes/embargos : main.rep_corp_helios < -50 → mission_embargo_helios.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.DiplomacyService.UnmirrorFromBlackboard(System.String)

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.MarketSimulatorConfig.Seed
member.summary: Seed pour la génération reproductible des offres (derive from initial sol to be save-stable). Si 0, utilise le sol courant comme seed.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.EarthMarketSimulator
member.summary:
Simule le marché terrestre : génère des offres de commerce à chaque sol en fonction des entités enregistrées, de leur réputation et d'une marche aléatoire des prix.
Brancher sur EnhancedEventBus.Subscribe("MartianDayPassed", simulator.OnSolTick).
Reproductibilité : la seed est dérivée du sol pour garantir les mêmes offres après un save/load au même sol.
var sim = new EarthMarketSimulator(tradeService, new MarketSimulatorConfig { Seed = 42 }); EnhancedEventBus.Subscribe("MartianDayPassed", sim.OnSolTick);

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.EarthMarketSimulator.Config
member.summary: Config courante (lecture seule).

member.summary: Initialise le simulateur.
member.param: Service de commerce auquel les offres générées seront postées.
Configuration (optionnel — utilise les valeurs par défaut si null).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.EarthMarketSimulator.OnSolTick(System.Object)
member.summary: Handler à brancher sur EnhancedEventBus.Subscribe("MartianDayPassed", ...). Génère les offres pour ce sol et purge les offres expirées (via TradeService.Tick).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService
member.summary:
Service de commerce entre Mars et les entités terrestres.
Gère les offres actives, leur expiration, et l'exécution des transactions.
Dépendances :
— pour débiter le stock orbital (ventes).
— pour appliquer les deltas de réputation.
joueur — pour créditer/débiter la monnaie.
La clé monnaie (moneyResourceKey) est fournie par le mod — le SDK ne définit aucune ressource monnaie.
var trade = new TradeService(orbitalService, diplomacy, "resource_terrian_credits"); trade.PostOffer(new TradeOffer { EntityId="corp_helios", ResourceKey="resource_iron", ... }); var result = trade.Accept(offerId, () => FactionWrapper.GetPlayerFaction());

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService.#ctor(PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.OrbitalStockService,PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.DiplomacyService,System.String)
member.summary: Initialise le service.
member.param: Service de stock orbital (pour débits ventes).
Clé YAML de la ressource monnaie du mod.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService.ActiveOffers
member.summary: Retourne la liste des offres actives (non expirées).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService.PostOffer(PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Models.TradeOffer)
member.summary: Publie une offre commerciale. Si une offre avec le même Id existe déjà, elle est écrasée.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService.RetractOffer(System.String)
member.summary: Retire une offre de la liste active (ex : expirée manuellement).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService.Accept(System.String,System.Func{PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.FactionWrapper},System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary:
Accepte une offre et exécute la transaction.
Vente (Mars→Terre) : débite le stock orbital + crédite la monnaie au joueur.
Achat (Terre→Mars) : débite la monnaie du joueur + enregistre une livraison différée.
member.param: Callback qui retourne le wrapper faction joueur courant.
Sol courant (pour les délais de livraison).
Nombre de sols avant livraison (achat uniquement).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Services.TradeService.Tick(System.Double,System.Func{PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.FactionWrapper})
member.summary: À appeler à chaque sol (brancher sur MartianDayEventData ou OnDaysPassed). Traite les expirations d'offres et les livraisons différées.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Wrappers.PortProjectWrapper
member.summary:
Wrapper typé pour PortProject (pipeline orbital d'un SpacePortComponent). Expose les données du projet en cours : stage courant, ressources collectées, état.
Membres vérifiés dans Tools\InteropDump\ScriptsAssembly\PortProject.cs : stageKey (string field), stageCompletionFactor (float), done (bool), developmentResources (Dictionary<ResourceType, CargoQuantity>), specialProject.type.name (string).

member.summary: Construit un wrapper depuis un object non typé (compatibilité).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Economy.Wrappers.PortProjectWrapper.GetDevelopmentResources
member.summary: Retourne le snapshot des ressources collectées par ce port. Clés = ResourceType.name (ex: "resource_iron"), valeurs en unités (CargoQuantity.ToFloat()). Retourne un dictionnaire vide si le projet est null ou sans ressources.

member.summary: Factory — retourne null si le projet natif est null.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry
member.summary: Registry for custom enhancement modifier handlers. Mods register handlers for YAML modifier keys unknown to the native game. When fires on Enhancements.Enable(), it iterates the EnhancementType.modifiers strings, and for each key found here invokes the registered delegate with the parsed float value.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry.RegisteredKeys
member.summary: All currently registered modifier keys (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry.Register(System.String,System.Action{System.Single})
member.summary: Register a handler for a custom modifier key. Replaces any existing handler for the same key.
member.param: Modifier key as declared in YAML (case-insensitive).
Delegate called with the parsed float value when an enhancement bearing this key is enabled.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry.Unregister(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the handler for , if any.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry.IsRegistered(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if a handler is registered for .

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry.TryInvoke(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Attempt to invoke the handler registered for .
member.returns: True if a handler was found and invoked, false if key is unknown.
member.example: // Used internally by EnhancementsEnablePatch — you normally don't call this directly. bool handled = CustomModifierRegistry.TryInvoke("drone_hop_bonus", 2f);

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.CustomModifierRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Removes all registered handlers. Intended for tests or plugin teardown.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.EnhancementsEnablePatch
member.summary:
Harmony Postfix on Enhancements.Enable(EnhancementType, bool). After the native system applies its known modifiers, this patch iterates EnhancementType.modifiers (typed IL2CPP field — List<string>) and dispatches unknown keys to .
Native keys (handled automatically by the game) are silently skipped — only keys with a registered handler in produce a callback.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.EnhancementsEnablePatch.Apply(HarmonyLib.Harmony)
member.summary: Apply this patch manually against a Harmony instance. Call once from your plugin's initialization — safe to call multiple times (subsequent calls are no-ops because Harmony deduplicates patches).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Enhancements.EnhancementsEnablePatch.Postfix(EnhancementType)
member.summary: Postfix — runs after the native Enable() has finished. Reads the typed EnhancementType.modifiers field and dispatches any modifier key registered in .

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions
member.summary:
Extension methods for resolving sender/target Handles to concrete game objects.
All methods use typed interop (zero reflection). Pass the game-owned Keeper (universe.keeper or baseGame.keeper) or Universe instance — both are available after GameCommandsReadyEvent.
Sender semantics per event family:
FamilySender is…
Building* eventsThe Building that changed. Use .
Faction* eventsThe Faction involved. Use .
Drone* eventsThe Drone. Use (search faction.drones).
Way* eventsThe Way. Use .
Planet* eventsThe Planet (singleton). Access via universe.planet directly.
Universe* eventsThe Universe. Access via baseGame.universe directly.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.ResolveBuilding(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs,Keeper)
member.summary: Resolve the sender Handle to a . Uses Keeper._HandleToBuildingSafe — returns null if the handle is invalid or the building has already been despawned.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.ResolveBuildingTarget(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs,Keeper)
member.summary: Resolve the target Handle to a . Use for events that carry a secondary building context (e.g. BuildingAfterChangeBuildingType where target is the new type's building).
member.example: var oldBuilding = args.ResolveBuilding(keeper); var newBuilding = args.ResolveBuildingTarget(keeper);

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.ResolveFaction(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs,Universe)
member.summary: Resolve the sender Handle to a by matching against universe.factions (O(n), typically 2–4 factions). Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.ResolveFactionTarget(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs,Universe)
member.summary: Resolve the target Handle to a .

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.ResolveDroneFromFaction(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs,Faction)
member.summary: Resolve the sender Handle to a by searching faction.drones (List<Drone>) for the matching Handle.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.ResolveWayFromFaction(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs,Faction)
member.summary: Resolve the sender Handle to a by searching faction.ways (List<Way>) for the matching Handle.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventExtensions.HandleEquals(Handle,Handle)
member.summary: Returns true when two Handles refer to the same live object.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs
member.summary:
Arguments passed to handlers. Wraps the raw native GameEvent struct captured at dispatch time.
Layout of GameEvent (72 bytes, blittable):
sender — Handle of the object that fired the event (typically the Building/Faction/Drone etc.).
target — Optional second entity (context-dependent, e.g. target building for an upgrade).
payload — Union of event-specific data (building, drone, faction, key…).
Use the extension methods in NativeEventExtensions to resolve Handle → Building / Faction without reflection.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs.EventType
member.summary: The managed event identifier (resolved from the native eventUid).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs.RawEvent
member.summary: Raw native event struct — sender/target handles and the payload union are accessible as typed fields (PerAspera.Events.GameEvent).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs.SenderHandle
member.summary: The Handle of the object that fired this event (Building, Faction, Drone, etc.). Pass to or to get the actual object.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs.TargetHandle
member.summary: Optional secondary Handle (target context, e.g. new type in a type change event). Null/Handle.Null when not used by the event.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs.Payload
member.summary: Union payload — event-specific data (attack damage, key string, faction sub-data, etc.). Access via typed fields: Payload.building, Payload.faction, Payload.key.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub
member.summary:
Typed bridge to the game's native GameEventBus.
A single Harmony Postfix on GameEventBus.DispatchInternal — the choke point every native event flows through (immediate AND deferred) — dispatches to managed handlers registered per . Event UIDs are resolved lazily via the typed static Gev* interop properties (zero reflection).
PROTOTYPE STATUS (2026-06): the struct-by-value patch parameter must be validated in game once — enable and check the BepInEx log.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.TraceAllEvents
member.summary: When true, every native event passing through the bus is logged (name + uid). Diagnostic / prototype-validation tool — leave off in production.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.Apply(HarmonyLib.Harmony)
member.summary: Apply the Harmony patch on GameEventBus.DispatchInternal. Call once from your plugin's Load() — safe to call multiple times.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.Subscribe(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEvent,System.Action{PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs})
member.summary: Register a handler for a native game event.
member.param: Called synchronously after the game's own listeners ran.
member.returns: True if registered, false if the native event UID could not be resolved.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.Unsubscribe(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEvent,System.Action{PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEventArgs})
member.summary: Remove a previously registered handler.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.Clear
member.summary: Remove all handlers (plugin teardown / tests).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.DispatchInternalPostfix(PerAspera.Events.GameEvent)
member.summary: Postfix on GameEventBus.DispatchInternal(GameEvent evt, IHandleable senderObjectHint). Parameter name MUST be evt (HarmonyX maps IL2CPP parameters by exact name).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.ResolveUid(PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEvent)
member.summary: Resolve the runtime eventUid of a via the typed static Gev* interop property of its owner class. Cached after first call.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeEventHub.ResolveAll
member.summary: Resolve ALL event UIDs eagerly — fills the reverse map so that shows names instead of raw uids. Call after the game is loaded (UIDs are registered during native static init).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Events.Native.NativeGameEvent
member.summary: Managed mirror of every native GameEventType exposed by the game (the static Gev* properties on Building, Faction, Universe, Planet…). Generated from Tools/InteropDump (2026-06) — 121 events, 11 owner classes. Use with .
member.example: NativeEventHub.Subscribe(NativeGameEvent.UniverseDayPassed, args => LogAspera.Info("Un sol martien est passé !"));

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.FactorySpawnOutputPatch
member.summary: Postfix on Factory.SpawnOutput() — runs only when a native production cycle actually completed (inputs consumed, productivity > 0), and injects the declared extra outputs as idle cargo in the factory's stockpile (ICargoHolderOps_XAddIdleCargo, badge null accepté — pas de [NotNull]).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.MultiOutputPanelPool
member.summary:
Shared clone pool for the secondary-output UI patches.
Design rules (learned the hard way, 2026-06-12):
Never Destroy a clone — Destroy is deferred in Unity and the vanilla update loop may still hold the reference within the same frame → hard crash. Clones are pooled and toggled with SetActive instead.
Never mutate the panel's own bookkeeping (outputResource / outputDetails) — vanilla rebuilds them on its own schedule and the lists desynchronise from our clones. We own our clones end-to-end and refresh their quantity label ourselves in an UpdateInputOutput Postfix.
No .NET reflection — every member used here is exposed by the typed interop proxies (verified in Tools/InteropDump/ScriptsAssembly/, 2026-06-12).

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.MultiOutputPanelPool.CloneName
member.summary: Name tag of the ResourceDetail clones we create (debug/identification).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.MultiOutputPanelPool.Sync(System.IntPtr,LayoutContainer,ResourceDetail,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.ResolvedExtraOutput},System.Func{ResourceType,UnityEngine.Sprite})
member.summary: Brings the clone set of in sync with : reuses pooled clones, instantiates missing ones, deactivates the surplus. Pass extras = null to just hide everything. Returns the number of active clones.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.MultiOutputPanelPool.GetEntries(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Active clones of a panel (empty list when none).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.BuildingWorldPanelMultiOutputPatch
member.summary: In-world building card (BuildingWorldPanel, the hover/click card): adds one pooled ResourceDetail per secondary output to the OUTPUT container.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.BuildingWorldPanelMultiOutputPatch.RefreshTexts(BuildingWorldPanel)
member.summary: Quantity refresh — same formatter as vanilla (GetOutputString).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.BuildingWorldPanelMultiOutputUpdatePatch
member.summary: Keeps the quantity label of the world-card clones in sync with the stockpile, on the same cadence as the vanilla refresh.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.BuildingScreenPanelMultiOutputPatch
member.summary: Left-side building screen (BuildingScreenPanel): same clone pooling on its own OUTPUT container. No GetOutputSprite/GetStock here — the sprite comes from ResourceType.iconName and the stock from Stockpile.GetTotalStock (not GetOwnStockForShow — idle cargo added via ICargoHolderOps_XAddIdleCargo has no registered slot, so GetOwnStockForShow returns 0).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.MultiOutput.BuildingScreenPanelMultiOutputUpdatePatch
member.summary: Quantity refresh for the left-side screen, vanilla cadence.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Native.Events.SpaceProjectEventPatchingService
member.summary:
Service de patching pour les événements liés aux projets spatiaux (SpacePort).
Hooks Harmony Postfix sur :
PortProject.SetStage(SpaceportStage) →
SpecialProject.Complete() →
SpecialProject.DispatchLaunchActions() →
SpecialProject.RecoverGatheredResources(SpacePortComponent) →
Membres vérifiés dans Tools\InteropDump\ScriptsAssembly\PortProject.cs et SpecialProject.cs. Complete() est privée native mais exposée publique par le publicizer BepInEx.
Risque SetStage : peut être inliné par il2cpp. Fallback documenté : patcher PortProject.OnTick avec détection delta stage.

member.summary: Initialise le service de patching pour les projets spatiaux.

member.summary: Construit un snapshot des ressources collectées en parcourant les PortProjects actifs. Utilise PortProject.developmentResources (Dictionary<ResourceType, CargoQuantity>).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.ResourceInit.ResourceInitAutoStart
member.summary:
Auto-start plugin: fixes the native loader ordering bug that crashes custom Manufactured/Mined YAML resources used as building input/output.
Root cause: YAMLLoader.CompleteLoading() calls BuildingType.PostInitialize() before ResourceType.PostInitialize() assigns indices to mod resources (index == -1). Building input/output structures are then built with invalid indices, and ResourceAllocation.RecreateIDs() (BaseGame.StartGameplay) throws IndexOutOfRangeException.
Fix applied automatically when PerAspera.GameAPI.dll is deployed: 1. Block premature BuildingType.PostInitialize() (while _MaxIndex == 0). 2. After CompleteLoading(): run ResourceType then BuildingType PostInitialize. 3. Skip BuildPanelPresenter.FillDetails() for buildings with mod outputResource. 4. Finalizer on BuildPanelPresenter.Start() to swallow residual panel crashes.
member.example: // Aucune action requise par les mods : déployer PerAspera.GameAPI.dll suffit.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.ResourceInit.ResourceInitAutoStart.VanillaMaxResourceIndex
member.summary: Highest vanilla+DLC resource index. Resources above this are mod-defined.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.ResourceInit.BuildingTypePostInitGate
member.summary: Blocks premature BuildingType.PostInitialize() while ResourceType._MaxIndex == 0. CompleteLoadingFix replays it in the correct order.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.ResourceInit.CompleteLoadingFix
member.summary: Postfix on YAMLLoader.CompleteLoading (default priority — runs before YamlExtensionsAutoStart.Priority.Last): re-runs ResourceType then BuildingType PostInitialize so mod resources get valid indices.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.ResourceInit.BuildPanelFillDetailsGuard
member.summary: Skips BuildPanelPresenter.FillDetails() for buildings whose outputResource is a mod resource (index > vanilla max). The internal display array is vanilla-sized only.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.ResourceInit.BuildPanelStartFinalizer
member.summary: Finalizer on BuildPanelPresenter.Start() — swallows residual crashes so the build panel never blocks, logging the exception for diagnosis.

member.summary:
Hooks into Building.FinishConstruction and Building.RemoveBuilding to automatically apply per-sector modifier contributions declared via SectorBuildingContributionSpec.
Call Apply(harmony) once in your plugin Load(), AFTER registering building specs.

member.summary: Apply HarmonyX patches to track building construction/destruction. Safe to call multiple times (deduplicates).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys
member.summary: Standard modifier keys for the per-sector modifier system. Use these constants when registering building contributions or reading values.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.BuildingLimit
member.summary: Additional buildings allowed in this sector beyond global limit. Default: 0. Each DataCenter adds +50. Patch: SectorBuildingLimitPatch reads this to increase allowed buildings.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.DroneCapacity
member.summary: Additional drone slots available in this sector. Default: 0. Each Communication Tower adds +3. Patch: SectorDroneCapacityPatch reads this per sector.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.RoutingQuality
member.summary: Multiplier bonus on routing path quality (SPFA weight) in this sector. Default: 0. Higher = drones prefer this sector's routes.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.HopCapacity
member.summary: Extra hop capacity for drones passing through this sector. Default: 0. Each relay/datacenter can add +1.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.ResearchSpeed
member.summary: Research speed multiplier bonus contributed by AI buildings in this sector. Default: 0.0. Each AI Research Lab adds +0.1 (10%).

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.PowerEfficiency
member.summary: Power grid efficiency bonus in this sector. Default: 0.0. Reserved for future power buildings.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierKeys.SatelliteActive
member.summary: Internal key — do not use in building contributions. Managed by SectorModifierRegistry.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Sectors.SectorModifierRegistry
member.summary: Per-sector modifier storage. Tracks float values keyed by modifier name for each sector. Values are additive: multiple buildings in a sector each contribute their share. Satellite coverage controls whether modifiers are active (GetTotal returns 0 without satellite).

member.summary: Mark a sector as covered by an active satellite. Enables all modifier contributions.

member.summary: Mark a sector as satellite-lost. GetTotal returns 0 for all keys until reactivated.

member.summary: Returns true if this sector has an active satellite.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI
member.summary:
Typed façade over the game's native UI system.
Entry point chain (all typed interop, no reflection): BaseGame.canvasRefs : GameCanvasReferences → UiManager, PopupManager, NotificationPresenter, and every native panel (buildingScreenPanel, knowledgeBasePanel, resourcesPanel…).
Requires the game UI to be loaded — call after GameFullyLoadedEvent (all members return null/false safely before that).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.CanvasRefs
member.summary: The game's UI reference hub (null until the game scene is loaded). Exposes every native panel typed: buildingScreenPanel, knowledgeBasePanel, techTreePanel, resourcesPanel, dialoguePresenter, tooltipPresenter…

member.summary: Native UI manager — panel/modal lifecycle (null before game load).

member.summary: Native popup manager (null before game load).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.Notifications
member.summary: Native notification presenter (null before game load).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.IsReady
member.summary: True when the native UI is initialized and usable.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.ShowPopup(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Action,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Show a native game popup (same visual as tech-unlocked popups) with one button. Wraps PopupManager.ShowGenericPopup — the managed callback is converted to an IL2CPP delegate via DelegateSupport.
member.param: Popup title (plain text, not a localization key).
Label of the single action button.
Optional managed callback invoked when the button is clicked.
member.returns: True if the popup was shown, false if the UI is not ready.

member.summary: Close a native side panel.

member.summary: Close whatever panel is currently open (no-op if none).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.CurrentPanel
member.summary: The currently open native panel (GamePanel.None if none).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.OpenModal(PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameModal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Open a native modal window (tech tree, knowledge base, space projects…).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.CloseModal(PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameModal)
member.summary: Close a native modal window.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.GameUI.ShowNotification(System.String,PerAspera.GameAPI.UI.NotificationUrgency,System.Single)
member.summary: EXPERIMENTAL — show a native notification in the right-side notification feed. Builds a Notification from scratch (public ctor + writable fields confirmed in the interop dump). Text resolution goes through displayName; the textId localization path is untested for non-localized strings — validate in game before shipping a mod that relies on it.
member.param: Text shown in the notification item.
Lifetime in game days before auto-expiry (0 = no expiry).
member.returns: True if handed to the native NotificationPresenter.
member.example: GameUI.ShowNotification("Cargo arrived in orbit", NotificationUrgency.Info, timeoutDays: 2f);

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.BaseGameWrapper
member.summary:
Wrapper for BaseGame singleton. Provides type-safe access to main game systems.
MIGRATION 2026-06-10 — interop typé d'abord : délégation au proxy . Vérifié contre Tools\InteropDump\ScriptsAssembly\BaseGame.cs. Les anciens doubles chemins « typé + fallback réflexion » ont été supprimés (le fallback ne servait à rien : si le membre typé compile, il existe). Corrections au passage : loadedSave/hasCheats/hasMods/difficulty sont STATIQUES (les lectures d'instance de l'ancien code échouaient silencieusement), et currentDay n'existe pas sur BaseGame (le sol courant vient de Universe.GetMartianSol()).
🤖 Agent Expert: @per-aspera-sdk-coordinator

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.FactionWrapper
member.summary:
Wrapper for the native Faction class (typed interop access). Provides safe access to faction properties and operations.
MIGRATION 2026-06-10 — interop typé d'abord : délégation au proxy . Vérifié contre Tools\InteropDump\ScriptsAssembly\Faction.cs. Nombreuses API fantômes corrigées : displayName/factionType/isPlayerFaction/mainStockpile/aiDifficulty/ aiPersonality/color n'existent pas ; GetResourceStock et HasTechnology étaient des chaînes de noms devinés qui échouaient toutes — réimplémentées sur les vrais membres.
🤖 Agent Expert: @per-aspera-sdk-coordinator

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.HandleHelper
member.summary:
Central API for Handle-based entity access in Per Aspera. Provides type-safe, validated access to game entities via the Keeper Handle system.
MIGRATION 2026-06 — interop typé : délégation directe à Keeper.map (KeeperMap typé, Contains/Find/_objects). Le downcast IL2CPP passe par le ctor IntPtr des proxies (équivalent TryCast, compatible avec la contrainte « where T : class » publique). Bug corrigé : FindBuildingsNear ne matchait JAMAIS (position attendue en Vector3 alors que Building.position est un Vector2).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.KeeperAccessHelper
member.summary:
Centralized helper for accessing Keeper instances from all major game systems Provides easy access to distributed Keeper architecture: - Universe.keeper → Factions, planets, resources - BaseGame.keeper → Core game state - GameEventBus._keeper → Event system entities - Swarm._keeper → Unit swarm management - Way._keeper → Pathfinding entities
DOC: F:\ModPeraspera\Internal_doc\ARCHITECTURE\Handle-System-Architecture.md

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.PlanetWrapper
member.summary:
Wrapper for the native Planet class. Provides safe access to planetary properties. For atmospheric data, use PerAspera.GameAPI.Climate.ClimateController directly.
MIGRATION PILOTE (2026-06-10) — interop typé d'abord : les membres délèguent au proxy interop (vérification à la compilation, IntelliSense, erreur de build si le jeu change) au lieu de la réflexion string-based SafeInvoke. La réflexion ne subsiste que pour les membres natifs réellement inaccessibles (ex: setter privé de waterStock). Les API qui n'ont JAMAIS existé côté jeu (GetResourceStock, AddResource, buildings sur Planet) sont marquées [Obsolete] avec un message honnête — elles retournaient silencieusement 0/vide depuis toujours.
📖 Enhanced Documentation: F:\ModPeraspera\docs\Planet-Enhanced.md 🤖 Agent Expert: @per-aspera-sdk-coordinator 🔧 Gap Analysis: F:\ModPeraspera\docs\Capabilities-Matrix.md

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.PointOfInterestWrapper
member.summary:
Wrapper for a single PointOfInterest instance. Uses direct IL2CPP cast — no reflection.
Source: PointOfInterest.cs (IL2CPP dump) Public methods: GetName(), GetLatitude(), GetLongitude(), GetDiameter(), GetPOIType() Fields centerLatitude/centerLongitude are protected — accessed via the public methods above.
var w = new PointOfInterestWrapper(nativePoi); string name = w.Name; float lat = w.CenterLatitude ?? 0f; // -13.37 for Coprates Chasma float lon = w.CenterLongitude ?? 0f; // -60.74 for Coprates Chasma

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper
member.summary: Wraps a native Per Aspera Sector, exposing geometry, state, and the per-sector modifier system. Sectors are quadrilateral zones on the planet surface — each can be unlocked/locked and enhanced by buildings (DataCenter → building limit, CommTower → drone capacity, etc.)

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.NativeSector
member.summary: The native Sector proxy. Use for direct IL2CPP operations.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.Id
member.summary: Sector index (0-based, matches YAML argument for UnlockSector/LockSector).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.IsEnabled
member.summary: Whether this sector is enabled — controls IsInsideEnabledSectors(). Setting to false blocks all construction in the sector.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.HasActiveSatellite
member.summary: True if a satellite is actively covering this sector.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.CornerA
member.summary: Corner A of the sector quadrilateral (2D lat/lng).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.CornerB
member.summary: Corner B of the sector quadrilateral (2D lat/lng).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.CornerC
member.summary: Corner C of the sector quadrilateral (2D lat/lng).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.CornerD
member.summary: Corner D of the sector quadrilateral (2D lat/lng).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.Contains(UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: Returns true if a 2D position is inside this sector's bounds.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetModifier(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Get the total bonus for a modifier key from all buildings in this sector. Returns 0 if the sector has no active satellite.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetBuildingLimit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get effective building limit for this sector: base + bonus from DataCenters.
member.param: The global faction building limit to add the bonus to

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetDroneCapacity(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get effective drone capacity for this sector: base + bonus from Communication Towers.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetRoutingQuality
member.summary: Get the routing quality bonus from buildings in this sector (0.0 to N).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetHopCapacity
member.summary: Get the extra hop capacity bonus for drones in this sector.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetResearchSpeedBonus
member.summary: Get research speed multiplier bonus from AI buildings (0.0 = no bonus).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.GetAllModifiers
member.summary: Get all active modifiers for this sector (for debug UI).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.ActivateSatellite
member.summary: Activate satellite coverage for this sector. All building contributions become effective after this call.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.DeactivateSatellite
member.summary: Deactivate satellite coverage (e.g. satellite compromised). All modifier GetTotal() calls return 0 until reactivated.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.Unlock
member.summary: Unlock this sector — enables construction within it. Prefer using UnlockSectorCommand from YAML for persistence.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.Lock
member.summary: Lock this sector — blocks all construction (same as LockSectorCommand). Use when satellite is compromised: LockSector + DeactivateSatellite.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.SectorWrapper.FromNative(Sector)
member.summary: Wrap a native Sector proxy.

Wrapper leger pour interagir avec le systeme de dialogues du jeu.

member.summary:
Wrapper for the native Universe class. Provides safe access to time, game state and universe-level properties.
MIGRATION 2026-06-10 — interop typé d'abord : délégation au proxy . Vérifié contre Tools\InteropDump\ScriptsAssembly\Universe.cs. Corrections au passage : « SetPaused » n'existe pas (vrais noms : SetGamePaused/ToggleGamePaused — Pause/Unpause n'avaient JAMAIS fonctionné), « GetBaseGame » n'existe pas sur Universe, et AddBlackBoard passait le wrapper au lieu de l'objet natif.
🤖 Agent Expert: @per-aspera-sdk-coordinator

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.WrapperBase
member.summary: Base class for all game object wrappers. Inherits reflection helpers from NativeWrapper<object> and adds BepInEx logging, safe convenience accessors (SafeInvoke / SafeGetField), and debug dump utilities.

member.summary: The native IL2CPP game object being wrapped.

member.summary: True when the native object is non-null.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.WrapperBase.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Wraps the given native object. Null is tolerated but the wrapper is then invalid: = false and every Safe* accessor returns default. (Previously a placeholder object was substituted, which made IsValid lie.)

member.summary: Invoke a method on the native object, returning default on failure.

member.summary: Invoke a void method on the native object, swallowing exceptions.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.Wrappers.WrapperBase.TryInvokeVoid(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invoke a void method on the native object and report success. Use this instead of SafeInvokeVoid when a fallback is needed — SafeInvokeVoid never throws, so try/catch around it is dead code.

member.summary: Write a field value on the native object, swallowing exceptions.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema
member.summary: Describes one extension section of the sdk.yaml sidecar file. A consumer system (MultiOutput, GasRegistry, a third-party mod…) registers its schema via so the loader knows how to deserialize, validate and report the section's items.
member.example: ExtensionSchemaRegistry.Register(new ExtensionSchema( section: "multiOutput", targetTable: "building", dtoType: typeof(MultiOutputConfig), validate: o => ((MultiOutputConfig)o).ExtraOutputs.Count > 0));

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema.Section
member.summary: Top-level key under extensions: in sdk.yaml (e.g. "multiOutput").

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema.TargetTable
member.summary: Native datamodel table the item keys refer to ("building", "resource"…). Metadata for tooling and cross-validation; the loader does not resolve natives itself.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema.DtoType
member.summary: DTO type each item of the section is deserialized to (YamlDotNet, camelCase).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema.Validate
member.summary: Optional semantic validation, called per item after deserialization. Return false to reject the item (logged as ERROR, item skipped).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Type,System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Creates an extension schema descriptor.
member.param: Native table the item keys refer to.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchemaRegistry
member.summary: Static registry of declarations. Consumer systems register their sections here BEFORE the game finishes loading YAML (typically from their plugin's Load()); the loader only accepts sections that are registered. Unknown sections found in a mod's sdk.yaml are logged as WARNING (the mod may target an optional SDK system that is not installed).
member.example: ExtensionSchemaRegistry.Register(new ExtensionSchema("multiOutput", "building", typeof(MultiOutputConfig))); bool known = ExtensionSchemaRegistry.TryGet("multiOutput", out var schema);

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchemaRegistry.Register(PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema)
member.summary: Registers a section schema. Re-registering the same section replaces the previous schema (last writer wins, logged).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchemaRegistry.TryGet(System.String,PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema@)
member.summary: Looks up the schema of a section.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchemaRegistry.All
member.summary: All registered schemas (snapshot).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionsLog
member.summary: Internal shared logger for the YamlExtensions module.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader
member.summary:
Scans StreamingAssets/Mods/*/sdk.yaml sidecar files, deserializes each registered section's items to their DTO type (YamlDotNet, camelCase), validates them, and exposes the merged result to .
Merge semantics: mods are processed in alphabetical directory order; on item-key conflict the LAST mod wins (mirrors the native !replace behaviour), with a WARNING logged. Parsed data is also persisted to ModDatabase (table sdk_extensions) for tooling/inspection.

member.name: F:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.SupportedVersion
member.summary: Format version of sdk.yaml this loader understands.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.IsLoaded
member.summary: True once a load pass has completed (even with 0 files found).

member.name: E:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.OnLoaded
member.summary: Raised after a load pass completes. Consumers resolve native refs here.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.ModsRoot
member.summary: Root folder scanned for */sdk.yaml. Defaults to the game's StreamingAssets/Mods; overridable for tests.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.LoadAll
member.summary: Runs a full load pass: scan, parse, validate, merge, persist, then raises . Idempotent — a new pass replaces the previous store.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.Get(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Typed lookup used by (item or null).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.GetSection(System.String)
member.summary: Snapshot of all items of a section (possibly empty).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.HasSection(System.String)
member.summary: True if at least one item was loaded for the section.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.DeserializeItem(YamlDotNet.Serialization.ISerializer,YamlDotNet.Serialization.IDeserializer,System.Object,System.Type,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Re-serializes the generic YAML node then deserializes it to the schema's DTO type — robust round-trip without binding the whole file to a generic graph.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.SdkYamlFile
member.summary: Root document shape of a sdk.yaml sidecar file.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.SdkYamlFile.SdkExtensionVersion
member.summary: Format version (see ).

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionLoader.SdkYamlFile.Extensions
member.summary: section name → (item key → raw YAML node).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions
member.summary: Public read API over the merged sdk.yaml extension data. Data is available once the game's YAML datamodel has finished loading (the loader runs automatically after YAMLLoader.CompleteLoading); subscribe to to resolve native references safely.

member.name: P:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.IsLoaded
member.summary: True once the load pass has completed.

member.name: E:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.DataLoaded
member.summary: Raised after extension data is (re)loaded. If data is already loaded when a handler subscribes, the handler is invoked immediately (no race at startup).

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.GetFor``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the extension config of one item, or null if the item has none.
member.typeparam: DTO type registered for the section.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.GetAll``1(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all items of a section, keyed by datamodel item key. Empty if the section is unknown or no mod provides it.
member.typeparam: DTO type registered for the section.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.HasSection(System.String)
member.summary: True if at least one loaded mod provides data for the section.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.RegisterSchema(PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.ExtensionSchema)
member.summary: Convenience passthrough to — declare your section before the game finishes loading YAML.

member.name: M:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensions.ExportSchemasJson
member.summary: Exports all registered schemas as JSON (section, targetTable, dtoType) for external tooling (validate_yaml_mods.py).

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.YamlExtensionsAutoStart
member.summary: Auto-start plugin: hooks YAMLLoader.CompleteLoading so the extension sidecar files (sdk.yaml) are loaded right after the game's datamodel is fully merged. Same auto-start pattern as EventsAutoStartPlugin.
member.example: // Aucune action requise par les mods : déployer PerAspera.GameAPI.dll suffit. // Les consommateurs s'abonnent à YamlExtensions.DataLoaded.

member.name: T:PerAspera.GameAPI.YamlExtensions.CompleteLoadingHook
member.summary: Postfix on YAMLLoader.CompleteLoading — triggers the sdk.yaml load pass once the native tables are populated (so consumers can resolve string refs).
